title: Skills
subtitle: Reusable instruction templates for your agents
name: Name
name_invalid: Invalid — only a-z, 0-9, _ and -, max 50 chars.
name_immutable: Name cannot be changed after creation.
when_to_use_hint: Tells the AI in one sentence when to load this skill.
when_to_use_placeholder: e.g. 'When the user asks for code review'
body_placeholder: Instructions the agent gets when loading…
sources_hint: URLs (forums, APIs, docs) the agent can fetch via fetch_url. Auth is auto-attached when a credential profile is set.
source_auth_hint: Optional: name of a credential profile from /credentials. Forces this auth on fetch_url.
agent_tab_empty: No skills available — create one under /skills or here.
